Output:
600:
601:export function applyCustomApiConfig(params: ApplyCustomApiConfigParams): CustomApiResult {
602:  const baseUrl = params.baseUrl.trim();
603:  try {
604:    new URL(baseUrl);
605:  } catch {
606:    throw new CustomApiError("invalid_base_url", "Custom provider base URL must be a valid URL.");
607:  }
608:
609:  if (params.compatibility !== "openai" && params.compatibility !== "anthropic") {
610:    throw new CustomApiError(
611:      "invalid_compatibility",
612:      'Custom provider compatibility must be "openai" or "anthropic".',
613:    );
614:  }
615:
616:  const modelId = params.modelId.trim();
617:  if (!modelId) {
618:    throw new CustomApiError("invalid_model_id", "Custom provider model ID is required.");
619:  }
620:
621:  const isAzure = isAzureUrl(baseUrl);
622:  const isAzureOpenAi = isAzureOpenAiUrl(baseUrl);
623:  const resolvedBaseUrl = isAzure ? transformAzureConfigUrl(baseUrl) : baseUrl;
624:
625:  const providerIdResult = resolveCustomProviderId({
626:    config: params.config,
627:    baseUrl: resolvedBaseUrl,
628:    providerId: params.providerId,
629:  });
630:  const providerId = providerIdResult.providerId;
631:  const providers = params.config.models?.providers ?? {};
632:
633:  const modelRef = modelKey(providerId, modelId);
634:  const alias = params.alias?.trim() ?? "";
635:  const aliasError = resolveAliasError({
636:    raw: alias,
637:    cfg: params.config,
638:    modelRef,
639:  });
640:  if (aliasError) {
641:    throw new CustomApiError("invalid_alias", aliasError);
642:  }
643:
644:  const existingProvider = providers[providerId];
645:  const existingModels = Array.isArray(existingProvider?.models) ? existingProvider.models : [];
646:  const hasModel = existingModels.some((model) => model.id === modelId);
647:  const isLikelyReasoningModel = isAzure && /\b(o[134]|gpt-([5-9]|\d{2,}))\b/i.test(modelId);
648:  const nextModel = isAzure
649:    ? {
650:        id: modelId,
651:        name: `${modelId} (Custom Provider)`,
652:        contextWindow: AZURE_DEFAULT_CONTEXT_WINDOW,
653:        maxTokens: AZURE_DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS,
654:        input: isLikelyReasoningModel
655:          ? (["text", "image"] as Array<"text" | "image">)
656:          : (["text"] as ["text"]),
657:        cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },
658:        reasoning: isLikelyReasoningModel,
659:        compat: { supportsStore: false },
660:      }
661:    : {
662:        id: modelId,
663:        name: `${modelId} (Custom Provider)`,
664:        contextWindow: DEFAULT_CONTEXT_WINDOW,
665:        maxTokens: DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS,
666:        input: ["text"] as ["text"],
667:        cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },
668:        reasoning: false,
669:      };
670:  const mergedModels = hasModel

assistant #543 commentary 03:03:57

我已经确认到一个很重要的差异：如果走 OpenClaw 的“custom-api-key onboarding”，对普通非 Azure 的 OpenAI 兼容地址，它默认不会帮我们生成 openai-responses + reasoning + image 这套元数据。你的配置比向导更准确，所以我准备直接把这段 provider 配进 OpenClaw 配置，并把默认模型指向它。

docs\zh-CN\help\faq.md:1888:- **默认 + 切换：** 将 `agents.defaults.model.primary` 设置为 `openai-codex/gpt-5.2`，然后编程时切换到 `openai-codex/gpt-5.2-codex`（或反过来）。
docs\zh-CN\help\faq.md:1895:如果设置了 `agents.defaults.models`，它成为 `/model` 和任何会话覆盖的**允许列表**。选择不在该列表中的模型会返回：
docs\zh-CN\help\faq.md:1901:该错误**代替**正常回复返回。修复：将模型添加到 `agents.defaults.models`，移除允许列表，或从 `/model list` 中选择一个模型。
docs\zh-CN\help\faq.md:1957:是的。OpenClaw 内置了一些默认简写（仅在模型存在于 `agents.defaults.models` 中时应用）：
docs\zh-CN\help\faq.md:1970:别名来自 `agents.defaults.models.<modelId>.alias`。示例：
docs\zh-CN\help\faq.md:2043:2. **模型回退**到 `agents.defaults.model.fallbacks` 中的下一个模型。
docs\zh-CN\help\faq.md:2087:修复：提供 Google 认证，或从 `agents.defaults.model.fallbacks` / 别名中移除/避免 Google 模型，这样回退不会路由到那里。
docs\zh-CN\help\faq.md:2636:**答：** 在 OpenClaw 中，凭据和模型选择是分开的。设置 `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`（或在认证配置文件中存储 Anthropic API 密钥）启用认证，但实际的默认模型是你在 `agents.defaults.model.primary` 中配置的（例如 `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5` 或 `anthropic/claude-opus-4-5`）。如果你看到 `No credentials found for profile "anthropic:default"`，意味着 Gateway 网关在正在运行的智能体的预期 `auth-profiles.json` 中找不到 Anthropic 凭据。

docs\zh-CN\gateway\configuration-reference.md:916:- `params` 合并优先级（配置）：`agents.defaults.models["provider/model"].params` 为基础，然后由 `agents.list[].params`（匹配的智能体 ID）按键覆盖。
docs\zh-CN\gateway\configuration-reference.md:920:**内置别名简写**（仅当模型位于 `agents.defaults.models` 中时适用）：
docs\zh-CN\gateway\configuration-reference.md:934:Z.AI 的 GLM-4.x 模型会自动启用 thinking 模式，除非你设置 `--thinking off`，或自行定义 `agents.defaults.models["zai/<model>"].params.thinking`。
docs\zh-CN\gateway\configuration-reference.md:935:Z.AI 模型默认启用 `tool_stream` 以支持工具调用流式传输。将 `agents.defaults.models["zai/<model>"].params.tool_stream` 设为 `false` 可禁用。
docs\zh-CN\gateway\configuration-reference.md:1408:- `params`：按智能体的流参数，会合并到 `agents.defaults.models` 中所选模型条目之上。用于为智能体添加特定覆盖，例如 `cacheRetention`、`temperature` 或 `maxTokens`，而无需复制整个模型目录。
docs\zh-CN\gateway\configuration-reference.md:1738:- `summaryModel` 会覆盖 `agents.defaults.model.primary` 用于自动摘要。
docs\zh-CN\gateway\cli-backends.md:83:- 如果你使用 `agents.defaults.models`（允许列表），必须包含 `claude-cli/...`。
docs\zh-CN\concepts\models.md:26:1. **主模型**（`agents.defaults.model.primary` 或 `agents.defaults.model`）。
docs\zh-CN\concepts\models.md:27:2. `agents.defaults.model.fallbacks` 中的 **回退模型**（按顺序）。
docs\zh-CN\concepts\models.md:32:- `agents.defaults.models` 是 OpenClaw 可使用的模型允许列表/目录（以及别名）。
docs\zh-CN\concepts\models.md:34:- 每个智能体的默认值可以通过 `agents.list[].model` 加上绑定来覆盖 `agents.defaults.model`（见 [/concepts/multi-agent](/concepts/multi-agent)）。
docs\zh-CN\concepts\models.md:55:- `agents.defaults.model.primary` 和 `agents.defaults.model.fallbacks`
docs\zh-CN\concepts\models.md:57:- `agents.defaults.models`（允许列表 + 别名 + 提供商参数）
docs\zh-CN\concepts\models.md:68:如果设置了 `agents.defaults.models`，它就会成为 `/model` 和会话覆盖的 **允许列表**。当用户选择了不在该允许列表中的模型时，
docs\zh-CN\concepts\models.md:78:- 将该模型添加到 `agents.defaults.models`，或者
docs\zh-CN\concepts\models.md:79:- 清除允许列表（移除 `agents.defaults.models`），或者
docs\zh-CN\concepts\models.md:187:- `--set-default`：将 `agents.defaults.model.primary` 设置为第一个选择项
docs\zh-CN\concepts\model-providers.md:24:- 如果你设置了 `agents.defaults.models`，它就会成为 allowlist。
docs\zh-CN\concepts\model-providers.md:148:- 通过 `agents.defaults.models["openai/<model>"].params.transport` 按模型覆盖（`"sse"`、`"websocket"` 或 `"auto"`）
docs\zh-CN\concepts\model-providers.md:150:- 可通过 `agents.defaults.models["openai/<model>"].params.serviceTier` 启用 OpenAI 优先处理
docs\zh-CN\concepts\model-providers.md:151:- 可通过 `agents.defaults.models["<provider>/<model>"].params.fastMode` 为每个模型启用 OpenAI 快速模式
docs\zh-CN\concepts\model-providers.md:184:- 通过 `agents.defaults.models["openai-codex/<model>"].params.transport` 按模型覆盖（`"sse"`、`"websocket"` 或 `"auto"`）
docs\zh-CN\concepts\model-failover.md:21:2. **模型回退**到 `agents.defaults.model.fallbacks` 中的下一个模型。
docs\zh-CN\concepts\model-failover.md:131:如果某个提供商的所有配置文件都失败，OpenClaw 会移动到 `agents.defaults.model.fallbacks` 中的下一个模型。这适用于认证失败、速率限制和耗尽配置文件轮换的超时（其他错误不会推进回退）。
docs\zh-CN\concepts\model-failover.md:133:当运行以模型覆盖（钩子或 CLI）开始时，在尝试任何配置的回退之后，回退仍会在 `agents.defaults.model.primary` 处结束。
docs\zh-CN\concepts\model-failover.md:142:- `agents.defaults.model.primary` / `agents.defaults.model.fallbacks`
docs\zh-CN\concepts\agent.md:100:配置中的模型引用（例如 `agents.defaults.model` 和 `agents.defaults.models`）通过在**第一个** `/` 处分割来解析。

22:const KEEP_VALUE = "__keep__";
23:const MANUAL_VALUE = "__manual__";

25:
26:// Models that are internal routing features and should not be shown in selection lists.
27:// These may be valid as defaults (e.g., set automatically during auth flow) but are not
28:// directly callable via API and would cause "Unknown model" errors if selected manually.
29:const HIDDEN_ROUTER_MODELS = new Set(["openrouter/auto"]);
30:
31:type PromptDefaultModelParams = {
32:  config: OpenClawConfig;
33:  prompter: WizardPrompter;
34:  allowKeep?: boolean;
35:  includeManual?: boolean;
36:  includeProviderPluginSetups?: boolean;
37:  ignoreAllowlist?: boolean;
38:  preferredProvider?: string;
39:  agentDir?: string;
40:  workspaceDir?: string;
41:  env?: NodeJS.ProcessEnv;
42:  runtime?: import("../runtime.js").RuntimeEnv;
43:  message?: string;
44:};
45:
46:type PromptDefaultModelResult = { model?: string; config?: OpenClawConfig };
47:type PromptModelAllowlistResult = { models?: string[] };
48:
49:async function loadModelPickerRuntime() {
50:  return import("./model-picker.runtime.js");
51:}
52:
53:const loadResolvedModelPickerRuntime = createLazyRuntimeSurface(
54:  loadModelPickerRuntime,
55:  ({ modelPickerRuntime }) => modelPickerRuntime,
56:);
57:
58:function hasAuthForProvider(
59:  provider: string,
60:  cfg: OpenClawConfig,
61:  store: ReturnType<typeof ensureAuthProfileStore>,
62:) {
63:  if (listProfilesForProvider(store, provider).length > 0) {
64:    return true;
65:  }
66:  if (resolveEnvApiKey(provider)) {
67:    return true;
68:  }
69:  if (hasUsableCustomProviderApiKey(cfg, provider)) {
70:    return true;
71:  }
72:  return false;
73:}
74:
75:function createProviderAuthChecker(params: {
76:  cfg: OpenClawConfig;
77:  agentDir?: string;
78:}): (provider: string) => boolean {
79:  const authStore = ensureAuthProfileStore(params.agentDir, {
80:    allowKeychainPrompt: false,
81:  });
82:  const authCache = new Map<string, boolean>();
83:  return (provider: string) => {
84:    const cached = authCache.get(provider);
85:    if (cached !== undefined) {
86:      return cached;
87:    }
88:    const value = hasAuthForProvider(provider, params.cfg, authStore);
89:    authCache.set(provider, value);
90:    return value;
91:  };
92:}
93:
94:function resolveConfiguredModelRaw(cfg: OpenClawConfig): string {
95:  return resolveAgentModelPrimaryValue(cfg.agents?.defaults?.model) ?? "";
96:}
97:
98:function resolveConfiguredModelKeys(cfg: OpenClawConfig): string[] {
99:  const models = cfg.agents?.defaults?.models ?? {};
100:  return Object.keys(models)
101:    .map((key) => String(key ?? "").trim())
102:    .filter((key) => key.length > 0);
103:}
104:
105:function normalizeModelKeys(values: string[]): string[] {
106:  const seen = new Set<string>();
107:  const next: string[] = [];
108:  for (const raw of values) {
109:    const value = String(raw ?? "").trim();
110:    if (!value || seen.has(value)) {
111:      continue;
112:    }
113:    seen.add(value);
114:    next.push(value);
115:  }
116:  return next;
117:}
118:
119:function addModelSelectOption(params: {
120:  entry: {
121:    provider: string;
122:    id: string;
123:    name?: string;
124:    contextWindow?: number;
125:    reasoning?: boolean;
126:  };
127:  options: WizardSelectOption[];
128:  seen: Set<string>;
129:  aliasIndex: ReturnType<typeof buildModelAliasIndex>;
130:  hasAuth: (provider: string) => boolean;
131:}) {
132:  const key = modelKey(params.entry.provider, params.entry.id);
133:  if (params.seen.has(key)) {
134:    return;
135:  }
136:  // Skip internal router models that can't be directly called via API.
137:  if (HIDDEN_ROUTER_MODELS.has(key)) {
138:    return;
139:  }
140:  const hints: string[] = [];
141:  if (params.entry.name && params.entry.name !== params.entry.id) {
142:    hints.push(params.entry.name);
143:  }
144:  if (params.entry.contextWindow) {
145:    hints.push(`ctx ${formatTokenK(params.entry.contextWindow)}`);
146:  }
147:  if (params.entry.reasoning) {
148:    hints.push("reasoning");
149:  }
150:  const aliases = params.aliasIndex.byKey.get(key);
151:  if (aliases?.length) {
152:    hints.push(`alias: ${aliases.join(", ")}`);
153:  }
154:  if (!params.hasAuth(params.entry.provider)) {
155:    hints.push("auth missing");
156:  }
157:  params.options.push({
158:    value: key,
159:    label: key,
160:    hint: hints.length > 0 ? hints.join(" · ") : undefined,
161:  });
162:  params.seen.add(key);
163:}
164:
165:function matchesPreferredProvider(entryProvider: string, preferredProvider: string): boolean {
166:  if (preferredProvider === "volcengine") {
167:    return entryProvider === "volcengine" || entryProvider === "volcengine-plan";
168:  }
169:  if (preferredProvider === "byteplus") {
170:    return entryProvider === "byteplus" || entryProvider === "byteplus-plan";
171:  }
172:  return entryProvider === preferredProvider;
173:}
174:

179:}): Promise<PromptDefaultModelResult> {
180:  const modelInput = await params.prompter.text({

assistant #569 commentary 03:06:31

模型连通性已经证实是好的，yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4 的 live probe 返回 status: ok。我再往前走一步，用 OpenClaw 的网关接口发一个真实请求，确保我们不是只探到 provider，而是整条“gateway -> model”链路都能回包。

Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
1:---
2:summary: "Expose an OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions HTTP endpoint from the Gateway"
3:read_when:
4:  - Integrating tools that expect OpenAI Chat Completions
5:title: "OpenAI Chat Completions"
6:---
7:
8:# OpenAI Chat Completions (HTTP)
9:
10:OpenClaw’s Gateway can serve a small OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions endpoint.
11:
12:This endpoint is **disabled by default**. Enable it in config first.
13:
14:- `POST /v1/chat/completions`
15:- Same port as the Gateway (WS + HTTP multiplex): `http://<gateway-host>:<port>/v1/chat/completions`
16:
17:When the Gateway’s OpenAI-compatible HTTP surface is enabled, it also serves:
18:
19:- `GET /v1/models`
20:- `GET /v1/models/{id}`
21:- `POST /v1/embeddings`
22:- `POST /v1/responses`
23:
24:Under the hood, requests are executed as a normal Gateway agent run (same codepath as `openclaw agent`), so routing/permissions/config match your Gateway.
25:
26:## Authentication
27:
28:Uses the Gateway auth configuration. Send a bearer token:
29:
30:- `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
31:
32:Notes:
33:
34:- When `gateway.auth.mode="token"`, use `gateway.auth.token` (or `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN`).
35:- When `gateway.auth.mode="password"`, use `gateway.auth.password` (or `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PASSWORD`).
36:- If `gateway.auth.rateLimit` is configured and too many auth failures occur, the endpoint returns `429` with `Retry-After`.
37:
38:## Security boundary (important)
39:
40:Treat this endpoint as a **full operator-access** surface for the gateway instance.
41:
42:- HTTP bearer auth here is not a narrow per-user scope model.
43:- A valid Gateway token/password for this endpoint should be treated like an owner/operator credential.
44:- Requests run through the same control-plane agent path as trusted operator actions.
45:- There is no separate non-owner/per-user tool boundary on this endpoint; once a caller passes Gateway auth here, OpenClaw treats that caller as a trusted operator for this gateway.
46:- If the target agent policy allows sensitive tools, this endpoint can use them.
47:- Keep this endpoint on loopback/tailnet/private ingress only; do not expose it directly to the public internet.
48:
49:See [Security](/gateway/security) and [Remote access](/gateway/remote).
50:
51:## Agent-first model contract
52:
53:OpenClaw treats the OpenAI `model` field as an **agent target**, not a raw provider model id.
54:
55:- `model: "openclaw"` routes to the configured default agent.
56:- `model: "openclaw/default"` also routes to the configured default agent.
57:- `model: "openclaw/<agentId>"` routes to a specific agent.
58:
59:Optional request headers:
60:
61:- `x-openclaw-model: <provider/model-or-bare-id>` overrides the backend model for the selected agent.
62:- `x-openclaw-agent-id: <agentId>` remains supported as a compatibility override.
63:- `x-openclaw-session-key: <sessionKey>` fully controls session routing.
64:- `x-openclaw-message-channel: <channel>` sets the synthetic ingress channel context for channel-aware prompts and policies.
65:
66:Compatibility aliases still accepted:
67:
68:- `model: "openclaw:<agentId>"`
69:- `model: "agent:<agentId>"`
70:
71:## Enabling the endpoint
72:
73:Set `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions.enabled` to `true`:
74:
75:```json5
76:{
77:  gateway: {
78:    http: {
79:      endpoints: {
80:        chatCompletions: { enabled: true },
81:      },
82:    },
83:  },
84:}
85:```
86:
87:## Disabling the endpoint
88:
89:Set `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions.enabled` to `false`:
90:
91:```json5
92:{
93:  gateway: {
94:    http: {
95:      endpoints: {
96:        chatCompletions: { enabled: false },
97:      },
98:    },
99:  },
100:}
101:```
102:
103:## Session behavior
104:
105:By default the endpoint is **stateless per request** (a new session key is generated each call).
106:
107:If the request includes an OpenAI `user` string, the Gateway derives a stable session key from it, so repeated calls can share an agent session.
108:
109:## Why this surface matters
110:
111:This is the highest-leverage compatibility set for self-hosted frontends and tooling:
112:
113:- Most Open WebUI, LobeChat, and LibreChat setups expect `/v1/models`.
114:- Many RAG systems expect `/v1/embeddings`.
115:- Existing OpenAI chat clients can usually start with `/v1/chat/completions`.
116:- More agent-native clients increasingly prefer `/v1/responses`.
117:
118:## Model list and agent routing
119:
120:<AccordionGroup>
Tool Result #575 shell_command call_IywvSPWWIz7bXp1B2kcl38rM exit 0 03:06:33
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: 1:--- 2:summary: "Expose an OpenResponses-compatible /v1/responses HTTP endpoint from the Gateway" 3:read_when: 4: - Integrating clie...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
1:---
2:summary: "Expose an OpenResponses-compatible /v1/responses HTTP endpoint from the Gateway"
3:read_when:
4:  - Integrating clients that speak the OpenResponses API
5:  - You want item-based inputs, client tool calls, or SSE events
6:title: "OpenResponses API"
7:---
8:
9:# OpenResponses API (HTTP)
10:
11:OpenClaw’s Gateway can serve an OpenResponses-compatible `POST /v1/responses` endpoint.
12:
13:This endpoint is **disabled by default**. Enable it in config first.
14:
15:- `POST /v1/responses`
16:- Same port as the Gateway (WS + HTTP multiplex): `http://<gateway-host>:<port>/v1/responses`
17:
18:Under the hood, requests are executed as a normal Gateway agent run (same codepath as
19:`openclaw agent`), so routing/permissions/config match your Gateway.
20:
21:## Authentication, security, and routing
22:
23:Operational behavior matches [OpenAI Chat Completions](/gateway/openai-http-api):
24:
25:- use `Authorization: Bearer <token>` with the normal Gateway auth config
26:- treat the endpoint as full operator access for the gateway instance
27:- select agents with `model: "openclaw"`, `model: "openclaw/default"`, `model: "openclaw/<agentId>"`, or `x-openclaw-agent-id`
28:- use `x-openclaw-model` when you want to override the selected agent's backend model
29:- use `x-openclaw-session-key` for explicit session routing
30:- use `x-openclaw-message-channel` when you want a non-default synthetic ingress channel context
31:
32:Enable or disable this endpoint with `gateway.http.endpoints.responses.enabled`.
33:
34:The same compatibility surface also includes:
35:
36:- `GET /v1/models`
37:- `GET /v1/models/{id}`
38:- `POST /v1/embeddings`
39:- `POST /v1/chat/completions`
40:
41:For the canonical explanation of how agent-target models, `openclaw/default`, embeddings pass-through, and backend model overrides fit together, see [OpenAI Chat Completions](/gateway/openai-http-api#agent-first-model-contract) and [Model list and agent routing](/gateway/openai-http-api#model-list-and-agent-routing).
42:
43:## Session behavior
44:
45:By default the endpoint is **stateless per request** (a new session key is generated each call).
46:
47:If the request includes an OpenResponses `user` string, the Gateway derives a stable session key
48:from it, so repeated calls can share an agent session.
49:
50:## Request shape (supported)
51:
52:The request follows the OpenResponses API with item-based input. Current support:
53:
54:- `input`: string or array of item objects.
55:- `instructions`: merged into the system prompt.
56:- `tools`: client tool definitions (function tools).
57:- `tool_choice`: filter or require client tools.
58:- `stream`: enables SSE streaming.
59:- `max_output_tokens`: best-effort output limit (provider dependent).
60:- `user`: stable session routing.
61:
62:Accepted but **currently ignored**:
63:
64:- `max_tool_calls`
65:- `reasoning`
66:- `metadata`
67:- `store`
68:- `truncation`
69:
70:Supported:
71:
72:- `previous_response_id`: OpenClaw reuses the earlier response session when the request stays within the same agent/user/requested-session scope.
73:
74:## Items (input)
75:
76:### `message`
77:
78:Roles: `system`, `developer`, `user`, `assistant`.
79:
80:- `system` and `developer` are appended to the system prompt.
81:- The most recent `user` or `function_call_output` item becomes the “current message.”
82:- Earlier user/assistant messages are included as history for context.
83:
84:### `function_call_output` (turn-based tools)
85:
86:Send tool results back to the model:
87:
88:```json
89:{
90:  "type": "function_call_output",
91:  "call_id": "call_123",
92:  "output": "{\"temperature\": \"72F\"}"
93:}
94:```
95:
96:### `reasoning` and `item_reference`
97:
98:Accepted for schema compatibility but ignored when building the prompt.
99:
100:## Tools (client-side function tools)
101:
102:Provide tools with `tools: [{ type: "function", function: { name, description?, parameters? } }]`.
103:
104:If the agent decides to call a tool, the response returns a `function_call` output item.
105:You then send a follow-up request with `function_call_output` to continue the turn.
106:
107:## Images (`input_image`)
108:
109:Supports base64 or URL sources:
110:
111:```json
112:{
113:  "type": "input_image",
114:  "source": { "type": "url", "url": "https://example.com/image.png" }
115:}
116:```
117:
118:Allowed MIME types (current): `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `image/gif`, `image/webp`, `image/heic`, `image/heif`.
119:Max size (current): 10MB.
120:

docs\gateway\openai-http-api.md:116:- More agent-native clients increasingly prefer `/v1/responses`.
docs\gateway\openai-http-api.md:141:    Use `x-openclaw-model`.
docs\gateway\openai-http-api.md:144:    `x-openclaw-model: openai/gpt-5.4`
docs\gateway\openai-http-api.md:145:    `x-openclaw-model: gpt-5.4`
docs\gateway\openai-http-api.md:154:    When you need a specific embedding model, send it in `x-openclaw-model`.
docs\gateway\openai-http-api.md:181:- If you want a specific backend provider/model for that agent, set the agent's normal default model or send `x-openclaw-model`
docs\gateway\openai-http-api.md:187:  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN'

assistant #579 commentary 03:06:39

网关接口文档也确认了：/v1/responses 和 /v1/chat/completions 默认是关闭的，得先在配置里打开。我打开后做一个最小文本回包测试，验证完整请求链。

Tool Call #580 shell_command call_X300etNMoYoTSb8ZXO3Maujd 03:06:49
shell_command input={"command":"$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'\n$configPath='D:\\openclaw_docker_state\\config\\openclaw.json'\n$cfg=Get-Content $configPath -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json\ni...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'\n$configPath='D:\\openclaw_docker_state\\config\\openclaw.json'\n$cfg=Get-Content $configPath -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json\nif (-not $cfg.gateway.http) {\n  if (-not $cfg.gateway) { $cfg | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name gateway -Value ([pscustomobject]@{}) }\n  $cfg.gateway | Add-Member -Force -MemberType NoteProperty -Name http -Value ([pscustomobject]@{})\n}\nif (-not $cfg.gateway.http.endpoints) {\n  $cfg.gateway.http | Add-Member -Force -MemberType NoteProperty -Name endpoints -Value ([pscustomobject]@{})\n}\n$cfg.gateway.http.endpoints | Add-Member -Force -MemberType NoteProperty -Name chatCompletions -Value ([pscustomobject]@{ enabled = $true })\n$cfg.gateway.http.endpoints | Add-Member -Force -MemberType NoteProperty -Name responses -Value ([pscustomobject]@{ enabled = $true })\n$cfg | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 100 | Set-Content -Path $configPath -Encoding utf8\n\n$token=(Get-Content 'D:\\openclaw_docker_state\\gateway_token.txt' -Raw).Trim()\n$env:OPENCLAW_IMAGE='ghcr.io/openclaw/openclaw:latest'\n$env:OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR='D:/openclaw_docker_state/config'\n$env:OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR='D:/openclaw_docker_state/workspace'\n$env:OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT='18789'\n$env:OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_BIND='lan'\n$env:OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN=$token\n\ndocker compose restart openclaw-gateway\nStart-Sleep -Seconds 6\n\n$headers=@{ Authorization = \"Bearer $token\"; 'Content-Type'='application/json' }\n$body=@{\n  model='openclaw'\n  input='Reply with exactly OK'\n  max_output_tokens=32\n  user='smoke-test'\n} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20\n$response = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:18789/v1/responses' -Headers $headers -Method Post -Body $body -TimeoutSec 120\nWrite-Output $response.Content",
  "workdir": "d:\\openclaw_docker_test",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}
